page.title: Bundles
page.description: Group multiple WhatsApp numbers under one bundle

empty.title: No bundles yet
empty.description: Create a bundle to group multiple WhatsApp numbers together
empty.hint: You can create multiple bundles for different projects or clients.
empty.feature1Desc: Send one-time passwords over WhatsApp with a simple API call using your bundle's unique key.
empty.feature2Desc: Each bundle has its own API key and slots — perfect for separating projects or customers.
empty.feature3Desc: Get real-time delivery callbacks to your endpoint so you always know the message status.

createDialog.title: Create New Bundle
createDialog.description: A bundle groups multiple WhatsApp numbers under one API key and webhook.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Bundle
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure? This will delete the bundle and all its slots. This action cannot be undone.

suspendDialog.title: Suspend this bundle?
suspendDialog.description: You're about to suspend "{name}". This is a disruptive action that will affect any active integrations using this bundle.
suspendDialog.consequence1: All API requests to this bundle will be rejected immediately.
suspendDialog.consequence2: Connected WhatsApp slots will stop receiving and sending messages.
suspendDialog.consequence3: Webhook callbacks will no longer be triggered.
suspendDialog.reactivateNote: You can reactivate the bundle at any time from the same menu.

rotateDialog.title: Rotate API Key
rotateDialog.description: This will invalidate your current API key immediately. Any existing integrations using the old key will stop working. Make sure to update your code with the new key.

slots.title: Slots
slots.description: Each slot is a WhatsApp number in this bundle
slots.empty: No slots yet — add your first WhatsApp number

deleteDialog.title: Delete Slot
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this slot? The WhatsApp number will be disconnected.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Use this key to authenticate requests to the Nabda API
apiKey.newKeyWarning: ⚠️ Copy your new API key now — it won't be shown again.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.description: Receive real-time event notifications for all slots in this bundle

messagesPage.title: Messages
messagesPage.empty: No messages found for this filter.

toast.webhookUrlHttps: Webhook URL must start with https://
